What We Build

What Types of AI Products Does Kovil AI Build?

AI Agent Pipelines

Multi-step autonomous agents for document processing, lead routing, customer ops, or internal automation.

RAG & Knowledge Bases

Retrieval-augmented generation systems that surface accurate answers from your proprietary data.

Voice AI & Conversational Apps

Voice-first or chat interfaces powered by LLMs — for patient intake, sales qualification, or customer support.

AI-Augmented SaaS Features

Embedded AI features inside your existing product — smart search, auto-summarisation, predictive suggestions.

LLM Ops & Evaluation Pipelines

Structured workflows to test, evaluate, and continuously improve your AI outputs at scale.

Data Extraction & Automation

AI-powered pipelines that pull, classify, and act on unstructured data — PDFs, emails, forms, and more.

How It Works

How Does a Fixed-Price AI Project Work?

01Days 1–2

Scope & Estimate

Share your idea in plain language. Our team produces a fixed-scope document with clear deliverables, a realistic timeline, and a flat price. No ambiguity, no hidden fees.

  • Fixed-price proposal in 48 hours
  • Deliverables defined in writing
  • No retainer — pay per project
02Weeks 1–N

Build in Gated Milestones

A dedicated squad builds your AI product in gated milestones. You review and approve each phase before we proceed — full visibility, zero surprises.

  • Dedicated squad, not freelancers
  • Milestone approval gates
  • Real-time progress visibility
03Final week

Ship & Handoff

We deploy to your infrastructure, write full documentation, and hand off the complete codebase with IP fully assigned to you.

  • Full codebase ownership
  • Deployment + docs included
  • Optional post-launch support

What's Included

What's Included in an Outcome-Based AI Project?

Fixed-Scope Document

A written agreement defining exactly what gets built, when, and for how much. Nothing ambiguous, nothing open-ended.

Dedicated Build Squad

A matched team — AI engineer, a project lead, and QA — focused exclusively on your project until delivery.

Milestone Approval Gates

You sign off at every milestone before we proceed. You always control the pace and direction of the build.

Full Code Handoff

At delivery you receive the complete, documented codebase. No lock-in, no subscription, no dependency on Kovil AI to run it.

IP Fully Assigned

All work product, models, prompts, and code built during the project are 100% assigned to your company upon final payment.

Post-Launch Support Option

Add a maintenance retainer post-launch and we'll monitor, patch, and optimise — so performance doesn't degrade over time.

What to Expect

What Should You Expect from an Outcome-Based AI Project?

Day 1–2
Day 1–2

Submit Your Idea

Share your concept in plain language — no spec required. Our team reviews it and schedules a scoping call within 24 hours.

Day 3–5
Day 3–5

Fixed-Price Proposal Delivered

You receive a written scope document: clear deliverables, milestone plan, timeline, and a flat price. No ambiguity, no hidden fees.

Week 1
Week 1

Squad Assigned & Work Begins

You approve the proposal, milestone plan is locked, and your dedicated build squad kicks off Sprint 1 immediately.

Weeks 1–N
Weeks 1–N

Gated Milestone Delivery

Each milestone produces a working, testable output. You review and approve before we proceed — full control at every stage.

Final Week
Final Week

Deploy, Document & Hand Off

We deploy to your infrastructure, write full technical documentation, and transfer 100% of the codebase and IP to you.
